caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a t-shirt with the text "However Do Shit." The setting appears to be a clothing store, as evidenced by the racks of clothes and mannequins in the background. The walls are adorned with numerous framed photographs, adding a personal touch to the environment. The man seems engaged in conversation, possibly discussing topics related to business or entrepreneurship, given the context of the setting and the nature of the show. The overall atmosphere suggests a casual yet professional discussion in a unique, retail-inspired space.
